name: CLX - MGA Insurance Policy Recommendation Engine v2

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. v2 upgrade — queries carrier_products instead of hardcoded matrix. v1 stays in repo as fallback until v2 proves out.

parameters.jsCode:
const productsList = Array.isArray($input.item.json) ? $input.item.json : [];
const a = $('Check Found').first().json.assessment;
const available = productsList.map(function (p) {
  return {
    product_id: p.id,
    carrier: p.insurance_carriers ? p.insurance_carriers.carrier_name : 'Unknown',
    product: p.product_name,
    features: Array.isArray(p.features) ? p.features.reduce(function (acc, f) { acc[f] = true; return acc; }, {}) : {},
    coverage_min_cents: p.min_coverage_cents,
    coverage_max_cents: p.max_coverage_cents,
    base_premium_cents: p.base_premium_cents,
    commission_first_year: p.commission_first_year
  };
});
if (available.length === 0) return { json: { _no_products: true, product_type: a.product_type, message: 'No carrier_products configured for product_type=' + a.product_type + '. Seed via carrier-product-create or carrier-seed.' } };

const systemPrompt = [
  'You are the Crystallux AI Policy Recommendation Engine for the INSURANCE vertical (vertical_id=insurance).',
  'Product type: ' + a.product_type,
  'Rank top 3-5 products by match quality given the client needs.',
  '',
  'For EACH product output:',
  '{',
  '  "product_id":               <uuid from available list>,',
  '  "carrier_name":             <string from available list>,',
  '  "product_name":             <string from available list>,',
  '  "coverage_amount_cents":    <integer>,',
  '  "premium_monthly_cents":    <integer>,',
  '  "premium_annual_cents":     <integer>,',
  '  "term_years":               <integer, 0 if not term-based>,',
  '  "ai_match_score":           <integer 0-100>,',
  '  "ai_ranking":               <integer 1-N, 1=best>,',
  '  "ai_reasoning":             <2-3 sentences>',
  '}',
  '',
  'Output strictly JSON: { "recommendations": [ ... ] }',
  '',
  'Rules:',
  '- Premium estimates are PRELIMINARY. Mark as illustrative ranges in your reasoning.',
  '- Use only carriers/products from the available list (must include product_id).',
  '- Consider: client needs (coverage gap), affordability, carrier reputation, features.',
  '- For term_life: term_years should match recommended_term_years from needs_analysis.',
  '- coverage_amount_cents must match needs_analysis.recommended_coverage_cents UNLESS recommending a step-down for affordability — call that out.'
].join('\n');

const userPayload = JSON.stringify({
  vertical_id: 'insurance',
  product_type: a.product_type,
  needs_analysis: a.needs_analysis,
  ai_recommended_coverage_amount_cents: a.ai_recommended_coverage_amount,
  ai_recommended_term_years: a.ai_recommended_term_years,
  client_situation: a.client_situation,
  available_products: available
});

return { json: { assessment: a, available_count: available.length, claude_payload: { model: 'claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929', max_tokens: 1500, temperature: 0.2, system: systemPrompt, messages: [ { role: 'user', content: userPayload } ] } } };

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, vertical_id: 'insurance', version: 'v2', recommendations_count: $('Fan Out Recs').all().length, suitability_assessment_id: $('Fan Out Recs').first().json.suitability_assessment_id }) }}
